name: @dst-launcher/desktop
description: DST Launcher 桌面壳与分发构建
author: wabicai <kaisheng.cai@onekey.so>

scripts.build: tsup src/main.ts src/preload.ts --format cjs --target node22 --platform node --out-dir dist --external electron --external tsx --clean
scripts.build:watch: tsup src/main.ts src/preload.ts --format cjs --target node22 --platform node --out-dir dist --external electron --external tsx --watch
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names BUILD,ELECTRON --prefix '[{name}]' --prefix-colors green,blue "pnpm run build:watch" "bash -lc 'wait-on dist/main.js tcp:${NEXT_DEV_SERVER_PORT:-3000} && electronmon dist/main.js'"
scripts.dist: pnpm run build:icon && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
